executives.name: Bob Long
executives.background: Mr. Long has over 40 years of experience in the mining and finance industries. He was previously CEO of Lydian International and has held senior roles at the International Finance Corporation (IFC).

executives.name: Glenn August
executives.background: Mr. August has served as a director since 2021. He is the Founder and CEO of Oak Hill Advisors, L.P. and serves as a member of the Board of Directors of T. Rowe Price Group, Inc.
